tips_en: Start with the AgentDoG 1.5 paper, as its lightweight safety framework and training-free online guardrails offer the most urgent and broadly applicable solution for aligning increasingly capable open-world agents. All three papers share a focus on overcoming practical deployment bottlenecks—safety, fragmented knowledge retrieval, and real-time latency—by introducing efficient, modular architectures that bridge foundational capabilities with real-world constraints.
tips_zh: 建议优先阅读 AgentDoG 1.5，因为它针对日益强大的开放世界智能体提出了轻量级、可实时部署的安全护栏方案，具有最广泛的现实紧迫性。三篇论文的共同之处在于都致力于解决大规模 AI 系统落地时的关键瓶颈——分别通过高效对齐、统一异构知识检索与实时推理蒸馏，将基础能力转化为可靠的实际应用。
